name: kraft
title: Kraft
description: Composable AI tools for text, clipboard, selection, OCR, workflows, and conversation.
author: kilingzhang

commands.name: kraft
commands.title: Kraft
commands.subtitle: AI Tools
commands.description: Open Kraft's AI tool menu powered by your configured API-compatible runtime.

commands.name: translate
commands.title: Translate
commands.subtitle: AI Tools
commands.description: Translate text between languages with the configured AI runtime.

commands.name: polishing
commands.title: Polish Writing
commands.subtitle: AI Tools
commands.description: Improve clarity and tone with the configured AI runtime.

commands.name: summarize
commands.title: Summarize
commands.subtitle: AI Tools
commands.description: Condense long text with the configured AI runtime.

commands.name: what
commands.title: Identify or Explain
commands.subtitle: AI Tools
commands.description: Ask what a term, passage, object, or OCR result is.

commands.name: selected
commands.title: Ask Selected Text
commands.description: Capture selected text from the frontmost application, then choose a tool or workflow.

commands.name: clipboard
commands.title: Ask Clipboard
commands.description: Capture clipboard text, then choose a tool or workflow.

commands.name: ocr
commands.title: Ask Screenshot Text
commands.description: Capture text from an image region, then choose a tool or workflow.

commands.name: tool-manager
commands.title: Text Tool Manager
commands.subtitle: AI Tools
commands.description: Create and edit custom text tools inside Kraft.

scripts.build-swift: swift build --configuration=release --arch arm64 --arch x86_64 && cp .build/out/Products/Release/{ocr,lang} assets
